aboutUsData.badge: Your trusted partner in English Language School
aboutUsData.title: About British English Academy
aboutUsData.description: British English Academy is a leading English speaking institute in Delhi, located in Vikaspuri near Janakpuri West Metro Station. We proudly serve students from Vikaspuri, Janakpuri, Uttam Nagar, Tilak Nagar, Subhash Nagar, Paschim Vihar, and nearby areas of West Delhi who want to improve their English fluency and confidence. We offer Spoken English sessions to working professionals, students, and stay-at-home mothers. Our knowledgeable instructors offer hands-on communication instruction, grammar enhancement, personality development, and interview preparation if you're looking for spoken English classes nearby or in Vikaspuri and Janakpuri. Along with spoken English, we also offer IELTS, TOEFL, OET, and PTE coaching.

testimonialsData.title: Why customers love British English Academy

reviews.name: Gurmel S.
reviews.review: I recently completed my IELTS training in Janakpuri from British English Academy and my experience was absolutely amazing. The trainers are highly professional, knowledgeable, and very supportive.
